Each row independently authored from raw concept + hive coding-agent dir survey; rows do not derive from one another (raw 117 5-check mandate / raw 118 self-application fixpoint / raw 124 byzantine consensus / raw 126 meta-rule self-host — 4 pairwise-disjoint seams).
fan_out.axis_b: cross-cutting pattern anchor matrix: 4 falsifier themes (5-check-mandate, self-application-fixpoint, byzantine-consensus, meta-stability) × 4 anchor files (tools/index.ts, agent-session.ts, hive-tasks.ts, tool-definition-wrapper.ts) × sequencing constraint (r126 → r117 ordering documented at @cf-6). Aggregates raw-level decisions into directory-pressure forecast. tools/index.ts absorbs 2 raws (r117 primary + r126 secondary) — single-file pressure noted; serialization required.
fan_out.axis_c: honesty disclosure layer: 5 honesty_* claims (no_implementation_in_this_cycle, tracking_ids_are_placeholder, landing_surface_existence_audit, no_convergence_dir_before_this_cycle, smallest_column_asymmetry) each grounded in file/dir-existence citation. Independent of axis_a content (axis_a tells you WHAT to land, axis_c tells you WHAT WAS NOT done this cycle and WHY claims are not fabricated). smallest_column_asymmetry adds a quantitative observation (4 vs anima 13 / hexa-lang 6 / airgenome 10 / n6 12).
fan_out.axis_d: META/NA exclusion rationale: 14 raws (109/110/111/112/113/114/115/119/120/123/125 = META set; 116/121/122 = NA set) have hive-column ≠ DIRECT in source matrix; explicitly enumerated and rejected from this propagation plan with reasoning ('META rows reach hive only via lateral inheritance from primary-landing project; NA rows are physics/dynamical-systems primitives without coding-agent landing'). Tier-1 broad-exclusion-with-reasoning pattern per absorbed-alpha SSOT-coverage motif.
fan_out.correlation_estimate: 0.18 — axis_a vs axis_b correlation: axis_b's 4 anchor files map 1:1 to axis_a's primary landings (zero overlap collisions across 4 raws), but axis_b's falsifier-theme dimension is genuinely cross-cutting (each theme is a distinct gate-shape). axis_c independence: honesty layer cannot be derived from axis_a or axis_b without external knowledge of which directories actually exist, sister-column counts, and which non-DIRECT cells were excluded. axis_d independence: rejection rationale comes from matrix non-DIRECT cells, NOT from any DIRECT-row content; provides counterpoint to axis_a's positive enumeration. Correlation estimate is LOWER than hexa-lang sibling (0.22) because hive's 4 raws are more disjoint per anchor file (no 4-of-6 single-file absorption like hexa-lang's self/parser.hexa).
